'''nasaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moaner|moaner]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moaner|moaner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nasaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næsæzæth|næsæzæth]] || [[word:næsæzæj|næsæzæj]] || [[word:næsæzæsh|næsæzæsh]] || [[word:næsæzæ|næsæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasasazath|nasasazath]] || [[word:nasasazaj|nasasazaj]] || [[word:nasasazash|nasasazash]] || [[word:nasasaza|nasasaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasazath|nasazath]] || [[word:nasazaj|nasazaj]] || [[word:nasazash|nasazash]] || [[word:nasaza|nasaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasafzath|nasafzath]] || [[word:nasafzaj|nasafzaj]] || [[word:nasafzash|nasafzash]] || [[word:nasafzaf|nasafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nasazatha|nasazatha]] || [[word:nasazaja|nasazaja]] || [[word:nasazasha|nasazasha]] || [[word:nasazaka|nasazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nasazath|nasazath]] || [[word:nasazaj|nasazaj]] || [[word:nasazash|nasazash]] || [[word:nasaza|nasaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nasazathal|nasazathal]] || [[word:nasazajal|nasazajal]] || [[word:nasazashal|nasazashal]] || [[word:nasazakal|nasazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nasazathatha|nasazathatha]] || [[word:nasazajaja|nasazajaja]] || [[word:nasazashasha|nasazashasha]] || [[word:nasazaka|nasazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nasazathan|nasazathan]] || [[word:nasazajan|nasazajan]] || [[word:nasazashan|nasazashan]] || [[word:nasazakan|nasazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nasazathaoro|nasazathaoro]] || [[word:nasazajaoro|nasazajaoro]] || [[word:nasazashaoro|nasazashaoro]] || [[word:nasazakaoro|nasazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
